description: Provider-neutral widget delivery headers for adaptation by CDN, object storage, or reverse proxy configuration.

headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; connect-src https:; img-src https: data:; font-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-src 'none'; worker-src 'none'; frame-ancestors https:; upgrade-insecure-requests
headers.Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), bluetooth=(), accelerometer=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=(), fullscreen=()

notes: Do not apply immutable caching to iframe HTML.
Do not use a wildcard Access-Control-Allow-Origin in production public API responses.
Tenant-specific frame authorization is enforced by runtime origin validation until dynamic per-tenant frame-ancestors policy is implemented.
